AVP: Alien Vs. Predator (2004)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $80,281,096Details
International Box Office $92,262,423
Worldwide Box Office $172,543,519
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$38,291,056 (47.7% of total gross)
Legs:2.10 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:46.5% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$70,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.5 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,395 opening theaters/3,401 max. theaters, 4.3 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $154,615,447

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: August 13th, 2004 (Wide) by 20th Century Fox
International Releases: September 30th, 2004 (Wide), released as AVP: Alien vs. Predator (Australia)
Video Release: January 25th, 2005 by 20th Century Studios
MPA Rating: PG-13 for violence, language, horror images, slime and gore.
Running Time: 101 minutes
Franchise: Alien, Predator, AVP
Cast, crew, or production detail: Franchise Crossover
Geographical setting: Antarctica
Plot point: Parasite
Social setting: Alien Invasion
Subgenre: Action Horror
Source:Spin-Off
Genre:Action
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Science Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Davis Entertainment
Production Countries: United States, United Kingdom, Czech Republic, Canada, Germany
Languages: English
